title: Finn Meets the Animals
synopsis: Little Finn explores the savanna and meets friendly animals who each make their special sounds.

pages.text: Finn walks in the warm grass. The sun is orange and bright.

illustration.description: A toddler boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes walking through golden savanna grass under an orange sunset sky, painted in gouache with thick brushstrokes and warm colors
illustration.alt: Finn walking in golden grass at sunset

pages.text: A big elephant says TRUMPET! Finn laughs and waves hello.

illustration.description: A large expressive elephant trumpeting next to a small boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes, painted in gouache with bold confident strokes and warm savanna colors

pages.text: A tall giraffe says nothing. But Finn sees its long neck reaching high.

illustration.description: A towering giraffe with its neck stretched up toward acacia leaves, with a tiny boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes looking up in wonder, painted in textured gouache brushstrokes
illustration.alt: Finn looking up at a tall giraffe

pages.text: A lion goes ROAR! Finn is not scared. The lion is friendly.

illustration.description: A golden maned lion roaring gently while a fearless toddler boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes stands nearby smiling, painted in warm gouache with expressive animal features
illustration.alt: Finn standing near a friendly roaring lion

pages.text: Time to go home. Finn waves goodbye to all his animal friends.

illustration.description: A boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes waving goodbye to an elephant, giraffe, and lion gathered together under the orange sunset, painted in thick gouache brushstrokes with golden grass
illustration.alt: Finn waving goodbye to his animal friends

metadata.illustrationStyle: gouache painting, thick brushstrokes, warm savanna colors, expressive animals, textured painterly, golden grass, orange sunset, bold confident strokes

questions.question: What sound does the elephant make?
Which animal has a long neck?
questions.explanation: The giraffe has a long neck that reaches high.

questions.question: What does Finn do at the end?
questions.explanation: Finn waves goodbye to all his animal friends.
